# MISA E-Services — Registration Workflow

The MISA Service Manual (PDF-02) documents the step-by-step e-services workflow
for registering and managing a foreign-owned entity.

## Typical flow

1. Create an Invest Saudi account at https://investsaudi.sa/en.
2. Submit the investment licence application with the chosen activity code.
3. Complete commercial registration and post-licence amendments as needed.
4. Integrate with ZATCA (tax) and Absher (resident services) for ongoing
   operations.

## Timelines

Most foreign-owned technology registrations complete within roughly 48-72 hours
of complete documentation. Timelines vary by activity and completeness of the
file; MISA does not guarantee a processing time.

## Next step

Follow the MISA Service Manual (PDF-02) at
https://investsaudi.sa/medias/MISA-Service-manual-12-2-edition-english.pdf and
begin registration at https://misa.gov.sa/en.
